item.title: Trump Adds A New Chapter To Detroit-Canada Bridge Saga
item.description: For years, there have been efforts for a new U.S. Canada bridge near Detroit. Donald Trump has added a new chapter to the saga.

item.title: 5 Ways AI Is Remaking US Healthcare Today
item.description: AI is becoming the nervous system of the modern health system, shifting the focus from gee-whiz demonstrations to thriving through efficiency.

item.title: Pushing Deeper Into AI Music Creation With Mozart AI
item.description: Mozart AI raises $6 million led by Balderton Capital as the music creation startup launches a mobile app and scales its AI powered audio workstation f...

item.title: An Outbreak, 440 Blood Samples, And One Teen Scientist’s Breakthrough
item.description: Puerto Rico’s 2024 dengue outbreak topped 6,000 cases. A 14-year-old student analyzed 440 blood samples, revealing age-based infection trends that cou...

item.title: The New ‘Overwatch’ Heroes Don’t Have Many Skins Or Other Cosmetics
item.description: The latest Overwatch heroes unfortunately don't have many skins or other cosmetics to unlock just yet.
